items.title: Run fresh Build123d vs CadQuery benchmark slices on the same cases before making any comparison claim
items.notes: Used build123d benchmark/runs/20260414_091747 and cadquery benchmark/runs/20260414_091748 as the main same-day head-to-head evidence for L1_218, L2_130, and L2_172.

items.title: Land only family-level Build123d fixes that improve runtime contract surfaces rather than case-specific patches
items.notes: Strengthened BuildLine ownership and revolve keyword contract across src/sub_agent/prompts/codegen.md, src/sub_agent_runtime/skill_pack.py, and src/sub_agent_runtime/tool_runtime.py.

items.title: Run focused runtime contract tests after the Build123d family-level fix
items.notes: PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" uv run pytest -q tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_codegen_prompt_contract.py tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_skill_pack.py tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_tool_runtime_preflight_lint.py -> 78 passed in 1.38s.

items.title: Demonstrate that a generic Build123d contract fix can unlock an entire family with a before/after benchmark rerun
items.notes: Build123d L2_88 moved from benchmark/runs/20260414_093041/L2_88 (8 rounds, failed, code_path_family_gap) to benchmark/runs/20260414_130005/L2_88 (1 round, validation_complete=true, eval_score=1.0) without changing the benchmark case or evaluator.

items.title: Produce a manager-shareable comparison package that ties conclusions to concrete plans/actions/queries/trace/evaluation artifacts
items.notes: Added report-20260414-build123d-vs-cadquery-benchmark/index.html, shareable-report.md, and detailed-evidence.md with concrete case evidence for L1_218, L2_130, L2_172, and L2_88.

items.title: Update docs/work_logs with today's comparison rationale, evidence, and remaining gaps
items.notes: Added docs/work_logs/2026-04-14.md and this checklist to keep the doc system aligned with the latest comparison and Build123d family-level fix.

items.title: Continue improving Build123d first-turn bias for half-shell plus directional-hole families
items.notes: L2_130 now fails in a more mechanized way, but same-builder skeleton and drill-plane contract still need stronger first-turn canonical recipes.

items.title: Continue improving Build123d countersink family convergence on centered hosts and local face coordinates
items.notes: L2_172 shows the current gap is no longer point placement; it is the unified countersink helper/keyword/host-face/cone-geometry contract.
